faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Irvington, NJ?
faqs.answer: Irvington residents most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in Irvington's older wooden structures, while pavement ants are common in sidewalk cracks and foundation areas throughout the town.
